articles.originalTitle: Mbappé rewrites France, World Cup history books as...
articles.originalSummary: Kylian Mbappé made history with a pair of goals that sent France on their way to a Group I-opening win over Senegal on Tuesday in New Jersey.

articles.title: 姆巴佩梅开二度，刷新法国队获胜纪录
articles.summary: 姆巴佩在世界杯历史进球榜上超越梅西，并在法国队 3-1 战胜塞内加尔的比赛中攻入两球，成为法国队的进球纪录。
articles.originalTitle: Mbappé scores twice, sets France record in win
articles.originalSummary: Kylian Mbappé moved ahead of Lionel Messi in the all-time World Cup scoring charts and became France's record goalscorer with two goals in Les Bleus' 3-1 Group I win against Senegal.

articles.title: 英格兰队 Livramento 出局 WCup，Chalobah 队进
articles.summary: 英格兰队周二宣布，蒂诺·利夫拉门托因腿筋受伤而缺席世界杯，将由切尔西后卫特雷沃·查洛巴接替。
articles.originalTitle: England's Livramento out of WCup, Chalobah in
articles.originalSummary: Tino Livramento has been ruled out of the World Cup with a hamstring injury and will be replaced by Chelsea defender Trevoh Chalobah, England announced on Tuesday.

articles.title: 美利奴：佛得角战平后西班牙“哀悼”

articles.originalTitle: Merino: Spain 'mourning' after Cape Verde draw
articles.originalSummary: Mikel Merino said World Cup favourites Spain are "dealing with the mourning" after their shock draw with underdogs Cape Verde in their opening game.
